intro_title: Find Your Next Favourite Movie Here
intro_content: Get access to a huge library of movies to suit all tastes. You will surely like it.
onboarding_content1: Explore a vast collection of movies in all qualities and genres. Find your next favorite film with ease.
onboarding_content2: Discover movies from every genre, in all available qualities. Find something new and exciting to watch every day.
onboarding_content3: Save movies to your watchlist to keep track of what you want to watch next. Enjoy films in various qualities and genres.
